_comment: Machine-readable palette for Sight Lines — sourced from Game.gd constants and shader uniforms. KAMA-44.
_delta_e_note: delta_e_tolerance is the maximum allowed CIEDE2000 difference between any sampled pixel and the reference hex when verifying a production screenshot.

palette.name: background
palette.role: Full-screen base fill. Dominant surface. Near-black with a cool blue-black tint.
palette.wcag_note: Background anchor for all contrast ratio calculations.

palette.name: dark_slot
palette.role: Empty placeable slot tiles. Slightly lighter than background to hint interactability.

palette.name: wall
palette.role: Impassable wall tiles. Must read as solid and non-interactive.

palette.name: observer
palette.role: Observer piece fill and icon. The only saturated cool-blue hue in the piece layer.

palette.name: mirror
palette.role: Mirror piece diagonal stroke. Near-white with a cool tint — reflective surface.

palette.name: ray_beam
palette.role: Sight ray beam (additive blend). Bright cyan in context; appears lighter against background due to blend_add.
palette.wcag_note: Additive blend means composite pixel color varies by background. Tolerance is wider than flat-fill colors.

palette.name: target_unlit
palette.role: Standard target tile in unlit (unfulfilled) state. Reddish-brown diamond.

palette.name: target_lit
palette.role: Standard target tile in lit (fulfilled) state. Warm amber-orange — the win condition color.

palette.name: avoid_target_unlit
palette.role: Must-not-light (TARGET_AVOID) tile in safe unlit state. Teal — do not disturb.

palette.name: avoid_target_lit
palette.role: Must-not-light tile in struck (forbidden) state. Alarm red — win blocked.

palette.name: ui_text
palette.role: UI labels, counters, status text. Muted cool grey — recessive but legible.
palette.wcag_note: Must achieve ≥ 4.5:1 contrast ratio against background #14171F (WCAG AA).

palette.name: title_text
palette.role: Level title and prominent labels. Slightly brighter than ui_text for hierarchy.
palette.wcag_note: Must achieve ≥ 4.5:1 contrast ratio against background #14171F (WCAG AA).

palette.name: win_state
palette.role: Win condition achieved. Bright green — reserved exclusively for win events. Must not appear during normal gameplay.

minimum_delta_e_between.reason: Walls must be legible against background at a glance.
Slots must be perceivably different from background to suggest interactability.
Target state change must be immediately obvious — core gameplay signal.
Observer and ray must be distinguishable so the piece is not confused with the ray.
